---
title: "CensusMapper 2.0"
subtitle: "VanCartoDay"
date: "Friday, May 1 2026"
author: 
  - name: "Jens von Bergmann"
    affiliation: "MountainMath"
  - name: "Leia Chen"
    affiliation: "CS @ UBC, MountainMath"
format: 
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    logo: mm_stamp_alpha.png
    css: ["default","default-fonts"]
    theme: mm_theme.scss
    background-color: #F8F4F0
#css: shift_heading_up.css
editor: visual
fontsize: 20pt
bibliography: common_literature.bib
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: true
---

## CensusMapper 1.0

CensusMapper 1.0 went live in 2015. [@census-mapper.2015]

<a href="https://censusmapper.ca/#11/49.2432/-123.1252" target="_blank1"><img src="images/censusmapper1.png" height="500"/></a>

## CensusMapper 2.0

Started thinking about CensusMapper 2021, did not start working on it until 2025. [@censusmapper-p-review.2021]

<a href="https://preprod.censusmapper.ca/maps/3053#10/49.239/-122.9224" target="_blank2"><img src="images/censusmapper2.png" height="500"/></a>


## Thank you!


### References and further reading

::: {#refs}
:::

::: {style="padding-top:100px;"}
:::

### Contact information

* Jens via [Bluesky (\@jensvb)](https://bsky.app/profile/jensvb.bsky.social), [Linkedin (\@vb-jens)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vb-jens/), or [email (jens\@mountainmath.ca)](mailto::jens@mountainmath.ca)
* Leia at [Linked \@leiahjchen](https://www.linkedin.com/in/leiahjchen/).
